name_en: Top Quality Unreleased [Exclusive Real Shot M25153 Black] This Georges Tote, named after Louis Vuitton's founder's son, is a refined choice for business. Exquisite Cuir Millésime grained calfskin, S-lock clasp, and internal metal plaque. 29 x 14 x 41cm (H x W x D)
